allergenDisclaimer: For label information only. Recipes and facilities may change. Check the packaging before consuming and contact support if unsure. The chatbot cannot advise whether a product is safe for you.

products.name: Atlantic Salted Caramel
products.description: Caramel bar with Irish oats and Achill Island sea salt.
products.ingredients: Irish milk whey protein, Irish oats, caramel-flavour coating and Achill Island sea salt.
products.allergens: Contains milk and oats (gluten). May contain peanuts, nuts and soya.
products.delayReason: A delivery of Achill Island sea salt arrived later than planned, so the next production run has moved.
